articles.title: Census Workers Attacked Amid Heatwave, Death Reported in Odisha! - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Census drive turns dangerous amid extreme heat! Serious incidents raise alarm.
Are field workers safe? Government now forced to act.
The house listing and census process, which began on the 16th, is facing major challenges in Odisha. Enumerators are going door-to-door under intense heat, mapping houses and marking numbers.
Amid this, an attack on a census worker has been reported in Kamakshanagar. In Sonepur, a family has alleged that a person died due to heatstroke. Several others have also reportedly fallen ill.
#BreakingNews #Census2026 #OdishaNews #Heatwave #WorkerSafety #IndiaNews #ViralNews #Exclusive #Kamakshanagar #Sonepur #TrendingNow #PublicSafety #BigAlert #KanakNews #CensusDrive
